title: Pipe Bomb and Launcher
description: adds a pipe bomb and a pipe bomb launcher
body:
adds a pipe bomb and a pipe bomb launcher

recipes in JEI

 ![shaped crafting recipe for pipe bomb (7 iron ingots, 1 redstone, 1 tnt)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd7b91c3593d2f91f1d821d59f79acc93677d83b.png)
 
Pipe Bomb

* 6 explosion power (2 more than TNT)
* affected by gravity
* looks like iron block
* made of iron ingots, redstone, and TNT
* recyclable into iron block (but you lose the redstone and TNT)
 
![shaped crafting recipe for pipe bomb launcher (3 iron ingots, 2 planks, 1 stick, 1 flint and steel, 1 redstone block, 1 diamond)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb65f0474b3acdf39c93838c79bfa991c960e76f.png)

Pipe Bomb Launcher

* fires Pipe Bombs like a grenade launcher
* 25 tick cooldown (same as crossbow loading time)
* looks like a gun
* made of iron ingots, wooden slabs, stick, redstone block, and 1 diamond.
* very good at mining (might want to wear blast protection)
 

Forge and NeoForge versions of Pipe Bomb and Launcher have a bug where half the time the pipe bomb block survives its own explosion.
Fabric version of Pipe Bomb and Launcher has a bug where all the time the pipe bomb block survives its own explosion.

CurseForge: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pipe-bomb-and-launcher](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pipe-bomb-and-launcher)

you can put this in your modpack but i don't know why you would
